name: Assign Campaign Cohorts
description: Auto-assigns campaign_cohort on nakamoto_knyt_personas based on investment_amount_band and crm_personas presence. Idempotent — skips already-tagged rows unless --overwrite is set. Never overwrites terminal states.

capabilities.name: Fetch Investors
capabilities.description: Paginated fetch of nakamoto_knyt_personas with band + state

capabilities.name: Fetch Personas
capabilities.description: Fetch activated crm_personas emails for reactivation check

capabilities.name: Assign Cohorts
capabilities.description: Maps band + persona presence → cohort; skips terminal states

capabilities.name: Bulk PATCH
capabilities.description: PATCHes campaign_cohort on matched rows in batches

steps.name: fetch_investors
steps.prompt: Paginated GET nakamoto_knyt_personas selecting id, Email, investment_amount_band, campaign_state, campaign_cohort

steps.name: fetch_activated
steps.prompt: GET crm_personas where identity_persona_id is not null, collect emails

steps.name: compute_cohorts
steps.prompt: Map each investor to top_shelf/zero_knyt/reactivation/general using band + has_persona

steps.name: preview
steps.prompt: Print cohort counts and skip reasons

steps.name: apply_patches
steps.prompt: PATCH campaign_cohort on each row (only if --apply)

cohortLogic.reactivation: band in ('500-999','100-499') AND has crm_personas AND not backed
